name: Enemosah Stephanie
bio: Stephanie is a writer, kind by heart, passionate by pen. Sugar believes every girl has a story worth hearing. Here to let her voice be heard, one word at a time

name: Ogwu Ezinne Kristal
bio: An ambivert who loves spending quality time with family and close friends. She values mutual respect and appreciation in all relationships

name: Charles Precious
bio: Precious lives by a simple philosophy: show up, lift others up, and extend a helping hand wherever it’s needed most

name: Chibuike Christiana
bio: Christiana advocates for truth and dedicated to speaking up where it matters most and standing firm for girls who need a voice
funFact: She sings a lot, and she's always happy

name: Dike Favour Chioma
bio: Chioma is a simple and jovial young lady. She's an ambivert who loves her space and embraces the journey of life with a happy heart and an open mind
funFact: She finds peace in singing, cooking, and reading novels

name: Okagu Chimamanda Christabel
bio: Christy is driven by a simple but powerful belief: that every girl should possess confidence to stand strong and self-determination to pave her own path
funFact: She loves singing and smiles a lot

name: Oyeniyi Praise Oyinkansola
bio: Praise is a strong young lady that shines with confidence
funFact: She is never afraid to try new things
